snapshots.overview: Uniswap is a decentralised exchange protocol built around automated market making.
snapshots.team: Founded by Hayden Adams. Core development has historically involved Uniswap Labs and external contributors.
snapshots.product_market_fit: Uniswap remains one of the strongest DeFi products by liquidity, usage, brand recognition, and network effects in decentralised trading.

governance.notes: Since November 2025, the foundation has been absorbed by the Labs and there is now a contractual obligation for the

snapshots.conclusion: Overall profile appears balanced, with no immediate extreme positive or negative signal.

snapshots.overview: Hyperliquid is a high-performance decentralised perpetual futures exchange and Layer 1 ecosystem.
snapshots.team: Developed by Hyperliquid Labs with a crypto-native trading and engineering focus.
snapshots.product_market_fit: Hyperliquid has achieved strong product-market fit in perpetual futures trading, with high organic usage and a differentiated exchange-led ecosystem.

governance.notes: there is no real governance role for the HYPE token. Hype is the native asset of the Hyperliquid EVM.

snapshots.conclusion: Governance structure limits conviction despite the protocol’s strengths.

snapshots.overview: Raydium is a Solana-based decentralised exchange and liquidity protocol.
snapshots.team: Built by the Raydium contributor ecosystem.
snapshots.product_market_fit: Raydium is a key Solana liquidity venue and has benefited from Solana trading activity and memecoin-driven volumes.
snapshots.conclusion: Governance structure limits conviction despite the protocol’s strengths.

snapshots.overview: Jupiter is a Solana-based liquidity aggregator and trading platform.
snapshots.team: Built by the Jupiter contributor ecosystem.
snapshots.product_market_fit: Jupiter has strong Solana distribution and user mindshare as a leading aggregator and trading interface.

governance.notes: DAO paused in 2025. Highly centralised decision-making.

snapshots.conclusion: Governance structure limits conviction despite the protocol’s strengths.

snapshots.overview: PancakeSwap is a multi-chain decentralised exchange originating on BNB Chain.
snapshots.team: Built by the PancakeSwap contributor ecosystem.
snapshots.product_market_fit: PancakeSwap has durable retail distribution, especially on BNB Chain, and remains one of the largest DEX brands by user reach.

governance.notes: There is no proper governance and the decision-making is centralised. The buyback & burn has been set

snapshots.conclusion: Governance structure limits conviction despite the protocol’s strengths.

snapshots.overview: Aerodrome is a decentralised exchange and liquidity hub for the Base ecosystem.
snapshots.team: Built by the Aerodrome contributor ecosystem.
snapshots.product_market_fit: Aerodrome has strong product-market fit as the dominant liquidity layer on Base.

governance.notes: Dromos Lab is the main development contributor so even if AERO does not operate under a classic Lab-DAO

snapshots.conclusion: Overall profile appears balanced, with no immediate extreme positive or negative signal.

snapshots.overview: Aave is a decentralised lending protocol enabling overcollateralised borrowing and lending across multiple chains.
snapshots.team: Founded by Stani Kulechov. Core development has historically involved Aave Labs and a broader ecosystem of contributors.
snapshots.product_market_fit: Aave is one of the leading DeFi lending protocols by scale, liquidity, integrations, and brand recognition.

governance.notes: Dual Labs-DAO structure remains a governance risk despite active governance and direct value accrual, as evidenced

snapshots.conclusion: Governance structure limits conviction despite the protocol’s strengths.

snapshots.overview: Sky is the successor ecosystem to MakerDAO, centred around USDS, decentralised credit, and modular capital allocation.
snapshots.team: Evolved from the MakerDAO ecosystem with multiple contributor and subDAO-style structures.
snapshots.product_market_fit: Sky has strong product-market fit in decentralised stablecoins and onchain credit, but the structure remains complex.

governance.revenue_accrual_type: buyback (reduced in April 2026) and staking rewards
governance.notes: DAO decentralised in theory but not in practice because of the existence of large SKY holders.

snapshots.conclusion: Governance structure limits conviction despite the protocol’s strengths.

snapshots.overview: Spark is an onchain capital allocator and lending ecosystem connected to Sky stablecoin liquidity.
snapshots.team: Built within the broader Sky ecosystem with specialist contributors.
snapshots.product_market_fit: Spark has strong potential product-market fit as a capital deployment and yield layer for USDS liquidity.

governance.notes: Unclear governance process and revenue accrual mechanism

snapshots.conclusion: Governance structure limits conviction despite the protocol’s strengths.

snapshots.overview: Ethena is a synthetic dollar and basis-trade yield protocol built around USDe and sUSDe.
snapshots.product_market_fit: Ethena has demonstrated strong product-market fit in crypto-native dollar savings products, though its model remains dependent on funding markets and risk management.

governance.notes: fee- switch criteria not met yet. As part of the discussion the Ethena foundation said that 100% of future revenues of

snapshots.conclusion: Governance structure limits conviction despite the protocol’s strengths.

snapshots.overview: Kamino is a Solana-based lending, liquidity, and structured yield protocol.
snapshots.team: Built by the Kamino contributor ecosystem.
snapshots.product_market_fit: Kamino has strong Solana-native product-market fit across lending, vaults, and liquidity management.

governance.notes: Governance process virtually non-existent as of September 2025. Centralised decision-making.

snapshots.conclusion: Governance structure limits conviction despite the protocol’s strengths.

snapshots.overview: Morpho is a decentralised lending infrastructure protocol built around markets, vaults, and risk curators.
snapshots.team: Built by Morpho Labs and a broader ecosystem of curators and integrators.
snapshots.product_market_fit: Morpho has strong product-market fit as modular lending infrastructure, especially through curated vaults and permissionless markets.

governance.notes: No dual lab-foundation conflict: Morpho Labs was absorbed by the Morpho Association, a notable first in crypto

snapshots.conclusion: Governance structure limits conviction despite the protocol’s strengths.

snapshots.overview: Euler is a modular decentralised lending protocol.
snapshots.team: Built by Euler Labs and contributors.
snapshots.product_market_fit: Euler has rebuilt credibility after prior setbacks and has strong potential as a flexible lending infrastructure layer.

governance.notes: Decentralisation reduced by the high token threshold for voting.

snapshots.conclusion: Governance structure limits conviction despite the protocol’s strengths.

snapshots.overview: Lido is a liquid staking protocol, primarily focused on Ethereum staking through stETH.
snapshots.team: Built by Lido DAO contributors and service providers.
snapshots.product_market_fit: Lido has very strong product-market fit as the dominant liquid staking protocol on Ethereum.

governance.notes: Strong governance design but centralised in practice because > 50% of the supply is controlled by 10 addresses

snapshots.conclusion: Governance structure limits conviction despite the protocol’s strengths.

snapshots.overview: Jito is a Solana liquid staking and MEV infrastructure protocol.
snapshots.team: Built by Jito Labs and DAO contributors.
snapshots.product_market_fit: Jito has strong product-market fit as a Solana-native liquid staking and MEV infrastructure layer.

governance.notes: Decision taking remains centralised. DAO influence growing but limited.

snapshots.conclusion: Governance structure limits conviction despite the protocol’s strengths.
